return(function(X,Q,V,j,W,u,Y,s,F,e,B,i,v,k,H,S,Z,M,I,P,p,K,q)M,Z,q,p,i,v,B,k,s,I,F,P,H,e,S,K=function(X,t)local Q=S(t)local V=function(...)return F(X,{...},t,Q)end return V Q=S(t)local V=function(V,j)return F(X,{V,j},t,Q)end return V end,function(F,V,j,W)local a,O,FH,b,BH,YH,c,y,A,L,S,Y,M,R,o,B,h,g,d,f,m,T,D,N,QH,WH,r,l,XH,K,Z,E,uH,J,x,U,eH,n,jH,w,G,tH,VH,C,z while F do
